subject: Old - English
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match hua waha answer bhara hai (answer_source).

questions.question_text: A board of directors refused a new proposal. Which word is a collective noun?

Find an abstract noun is given below:
What is the reason for his failure in exams?
You cannot go for playing outside, first, do your homework. Which word is a non-count noun?
Please keep boxes carefully. Which word is a common noun?
Butterflies taste with their legs. Which word is a plural noun?
He broke my mother's favorite vase. Which word is a common noun?
The elephant is an enormous animal on land. Which word is an animate noun?
Curiosity has its own reason for existing. (Albert Einstein) Which word is an abstract noun?
Coffee gives me great relaxation on cold nights of winter. Which word is a non-countable noun?
The writer's argument was supported in his view. Which word is a non-count noun?
A keeper throws the ball. Which word is a subject noun?
He is the hero of the country. Which word is a masculine noun?
Plants make food in the presence of sunlight. Which word is a compound noun?
There were loud sounds in the concert. Which word is a count noun?
He gave me a diamond ring on my birthday. Which word is a material noun?
I saw a herd of wild horses. Which word is a collective noun?
First aid was given to the wounded man. Which word is a collective noun?
A surgeon operated my father. Which word is a common noun?
My sister eats chocolate. Which word is a nominative noun?
The bakers bake bread. Which word is a common noun?

Pick a countable noun.
Where are my books? I kept it on my study table.
I saw birds flying in the air. Which word is a common noun?
Sometimes, I do not understand John. Which word is a proper noun?

The little puppy growled at the boy.
